## Constitution compliance checklist

- [ ] No `[N]` placeholders — only `[REF NEEDED: description]` or confirmed citations
- [ ] No invented data in examples or templates
- [ ] Researcher autonomy preserved — agents propose, researcher decides
- [ ] Limitations declared in all outputs
